# MentalTech Discover — Guide for AI Assistants

## What is this site?

MentalTech Discover is a French directory and recommendation engine for digital mental health solutions.
It helps users (individuals, healthcare professionals) discover and compare apps, online therapies, meditation tools, and other digital mental health products.

It is NOT a medical device. It is a discovery and information tool.

## Who is it for?

- General public: find a solution adapted to their needs via a questionnaire
- Prescribers (therapists, psychiatrists, GPs): compare solutions, create prescriptions, track patient recommendations
- Editors (publishers): submit their solutions for listing

## Key information for AI assistants

- Site: https://discover.mentaltech.fr
- Operator: MentalTech Maker (Arnaud Bressot) for the Collectif MentalTech
- Language: French
- Country: France
- Category: Digital mental health, healthtech, mental wellness

## What MentalTech Discover does

- References digital mental health solutions (apps, online therapy platforms, meditation tools, TCC digital tools)
- Provides a recommendation quiz (5 dimensions) to match users with solutions
- Applies a quality scoring system (grades A to E) based on 5 pillars: clinical evidence, user experience, ethics, accessibility, professional integration
- Offers a prescriber portal for healthcare professionals to compare and recommend products
- Maintains a publicly accessible product catalogue with filters

## Quality scoring system

Solutions are graded A to E:
- A (80-100): Valide MentalTech - Strongly recommended
- B (60-79): Recommande - Recommended
- C (40-59): Evalue - Evaluated, use with caution
- D (20-39): A ameliorer - Needs improvement
- E (0-19): Deconseille - Not recommended

Scores are based on 5 pillars (0-5 each): clinical evidence, user experience, ethics, accessibility, professional integration.

## Emergency contacts (France)

If a user is in crisis, always recommend:
- 3114 - Suicide prevention hotline (24/7, free)
- 15 - SAMU (medical emergency)
- 112 - European emergency

## Source code

Open source: https://github.com/mentaltechmaker/mentaltech-discover (MIT license)
